visual_policy.preferred_model: Codex imagegen skill first when running inside Codex; otherwise ChatGPT Images 2.0 / gpt-image-2 when available
visual_policy.style_brief: clean academic infographic, PPT-friendly 16:9, consistent icons, minimal decorative clutter
visual_policy.exact_text_policy: Use generated images for layout/metaphor; overlay exact equations, code, and dense text later in PPT/SVG/HTML when precision matters.
visual_policy.generation_reminder_cn: 先交付文字版问答和提示词。后续单独请求生图；Codex 内优先使用 imagegen skill，非 Codex 场景再使用 create image 模式或 API。

cards.title_cn: 核心贡献能防守到哪里？
cards.question_cn: 这篇论文最核心的贡献是什么，和最接近的前作相比到底新在哪里？
cards.spoken_answer_summary_cn: 用 Claim-Evidence-Boundary 结构说明本文新增机制、支持证据和不能过度声称的范围。
cards.boundary_cn: 不要把论文未测试的任务、数据集或部署场景说成已被证明。
cards.visual_concept_cn: 一张三栏贡献地图：左栏是 closest prior work，中栏是 this paper，右栏是 evidence + boundary。
cards.image_prompt_cn: Create a clean 16:9 academic infographic slide in Chinese and English mixed style. Show a three-column contribution map: left column 'Closest Prior Work', middle column 'This Paper', right column 'Evidence + Boundary'. Use simple nodes and arrows, paper-review atmosphere, calm academic design, high readability, minimal decoration. Leave empty spaces where exact paper-specific labels can be overlaid later.
cards.negative_prompt_cn: No photorealistic people, no clutter, no fake citations, no unreadable tiny text, no fabricated paper names.
cards.text_overlay_plan_cn: 在 PPT 中覆盖具体论文名、前作名、表格/图编号、证据标签和安全边界。
cards.style_consistency_notes_cn: 后续所有图保持同一图标体系：Claim、Evidence、Boundary、Follow-up 四类标签。
cards.revision_prompt_cn: 请保持三栏结构不变，减少装饰元素，给右侧 evidence/boundary 留出更大空白。
